canonical_payload: RFC 8785 JCS canonical JSON UTF-8 bytes.
included_fields: Domain envelope plus payload.
excluded_fields: Pretty spacing insertion-order output and tool-specific serialization.
validation_rule: JCS test vectors must pass before import tests run.
risk: Different runtimes can hash different bytes for the same JSON.

included_fields: Algorithm prefix canonicalization prefix and lowercase hex digest.
validation_rule: Harness rejects unprefixed row checksums.
risk: Ambiguous digests make migrations and audits brittle.

included_fields: Exact file or raw sidecar bytes.
validation_rule: Harness verifies byte checksum changes on whitespace-only source file edits.
risk: Semantic checksums cannot prove exact export provenance.

included_fields: domain checksum_rule source_system source_file source_row_id payload.
validation_rule: Harness rejects source row checksums without domain envelope.
risk: Same payload can otherwise collide across row roles.

included_fields: domain checksum_rule privacy_mode spec row_id payload.
excluded_fields: row_checksum generated_at transient process id signatures.
validation_rule: Harness verifies checksum changes when privacy_mode changes.
risk: Output mode differences can be hidden if privacy mode is omitted.

included_fields: Full bytes as exported or fixture-authored.
validation_rule: Whitespace edit changes sha256:bytes checksum while source row checksum may remain stable.
risk: File provenance and semantic row provenance answer different questions.

included_fields: Page file path page index and file checksum in manifest.
excluded_fields: Merged observation export without page refs.
validation_rule: Harness requires checksums for every cursor page file.
risk: Pagination completeness cannot be audited without page refs.

canonical_payload: Parsed trace row object in source envelope.
included_fields: id timestamp userId sessionId tags environment metadata and unknown fields.
validation_rule: Harness verifies source row checksum is independent of privacy mode.
risk: Source checksum must prove what was imported before privacy transforms.

canonical_payload: Parsed observation object in source envelope.
included_fields: core basic time IO metadata model usage prompt metrics fields when present.
excluded_fields: Mapped Kolm field names and converted latency.
validation_rule: Harness detects source value changes before normalization.
risk: Field loss is hard to audit if only normalized rows are hashed.

canonical_payload: Parsed score object in source envelope.
included_fields: id name dataType value stringValue comment configId target IDs.
validation_rule: Harness source checksum does not change when score-map config changes.
risk: Score source evidence and local interpretation must be separable.

canonical_payload: Parsed dataset item object in source envelope.
included_fields: input expectedOutput metadata sourceTraceId sourceObservationId status version fields.
validation_rule: Harness source checksum includes source links while evalcase checksum excludes them.
risk: Source linkage must be retained for audit but denied from artifacts.

canonical_payload: File byte checksum plus parse-loss row only.
included_fields: source_file checksum source_path loss code count.
validation_rule: Harness rejects semantic source row checksum for malformed JSON.
risk: Invalid rows cannot have trustworthy semantic row hashes.

included_fields: spec row_id source allowed refs identity hash routing timestamps input output metrics.
excluded_fields: checksum field direct user ID direct session ID raw sidecar content.
validation_rule: Harness deny-lists direct IDs and validates row checksum excludes itself.
risk: Self-referential checksums and identity leaks break audit semantics.

included_fields: score id source refs name type value string value comment policy attachment eval_use.
validation_rule: Harness fails any imported score row with K-score fields.
risk: External scores must not become Kolm proof metrics.

included_fields: case_id input expected allowlisted metadata.
excluded_fields: sourceTraceId sourceObservationId score IDs direct user IDs direct session IDs privacy metadata.
validation_rule: Harness applies evalcase denylist before checksum.
risk: Artifact-bound checksums must match artifact-bound privacy boundaries.

included_fields: manifest id privacy mode source path code count sample_included false.
validation_rule: Harness rejects sample_included true outside raw mode.
risk: Loss reports can become shadow data stores.

canonical_payload: Canonical line objects sorted by row_id.
included_fields: file name line count row checksums joined-content checksum.
validation_rule: Harness parses every line and checks stable row order.
risk: Snapshot diffs become noisy and row omission can hide.

included_fields: spec manifest id source window file checksums row checksums privacy retention counts artifact refs.
excluded_fields: manifest checksums signatures purge state last accessed debug timing.
validation_rule: Harness content checksum remains stable after purge state update.
risk: Mutable lifecycle state should not rewrite import proof.

included_fields: manifest id prior content checksum purge state target results operation timestamp actor hash partial failures.
excluded_fields: source row payloads normalized row payloads.
validation_rule: Harness state checksum changes after purge state changes.
risk: Purge evidence needs its own auditable state hash.

included_fields: privacy mode redaction markers checksums counts allowed fields.
validation_rule: Harness verifies different payload modes produce different row checksums.
risk: Mode collapse can hide privacy regressions.

included_fields: sidecar path byte checksum retention purge target.
excluded_fields: Embedded raw content in manifest or loss row.
validation_rule: Harness requires sidecar refs and purge target entries in raw mode.
risk: Raw sidecars need lifecycle controls separate from JSON rows.

canonical_payload: UTC ISO 8601 strings in normalized payload.
included_fields: normalized start end created updated purge_after fields.
excluded_fields: Source timestamp rewriting in source row checksum.
validation_rule: Harness source checksum changes only with source payload while normalized checksum uses canonical UTC string.
risk: Timestamp normalization must not obscure source provenance.

canonical_payload: Parsed source numbers and normalized integer microseconds.
included_fields: source cost latency totalCost timeToFirstToken values and normalized microseconds.
validation_rule: Harness rejects NaN Infinity and unexpected rounding.
risk: Cost and latency proof can drift with numeric formatting.

included_fields: messages tags score categories as supplied unless schema says otherwise.
excluded_fields: Implicit sorting de-duping or case folding.
validation_rule: Harness mutates order and expects checksum change.
risk: Array order can be semantically meaningful for chat traces.

canonical_payload: Exact parsed Unicode string in JCS payload.
included_fields: content comments IDs labels with original whitespace and case.
excluded_fields: Unicode normalization trim case-fold before source checksum.
validation_rule: Harness verifies string mutations change checksums.
risk: String transforms can hide identity or content changes.

included_fields: rule id algorithm domain and source system.
validation_rule: Harness rejects envelopes without checksum_rule.
risk: Algorithm migration needs explicit versioning.

canonical_payload: Blueprint symbolic checksums are placeholders only.
included_fields: Final fixture files must include real checksums.
validation_rule: Harness rejects placeholder patterns.
risk: Cosmetic checksums undermine manifest proof.

canonical_payload: Manifest source window and page checksums.
included_fields: fromStartTime toStartTime cursor page refs dataset version timestamp.
validation_rule: Harness verifies page count and dataset version match manifest.
risk: Incomplete source windows can look like valid imports.

canonical_payload: Checksums signed after canonical payload is complete.
included_fields: content checksum state checksum signer key id receipt mode.
validation_rule: Harness excludes signature fields from signed checksum payload.
risk: Self-including signatures are invalid and non-repeatable.

canonical_payload: RFC vectors domain envelopes file bytes row modes and manifest states.
included_fields: All checksum categories used by Langfuse support-v1.
excluded_fields: Product importer code before checksum tests.
validation_rule: CI blocks executable fixtures until checksum harness passes.
risk: Fixture checksums need proof before live connectors depend on them.
